items.desc_en: While the United States leans into its domestic crude oil production, one state is being left out to dry, California.
items.desc_zh: 虽然美国倾向于国内原油生产，但有一个州却被排除在外，那就是加利福尼亚州。

items.title_en: Wall Street still loves streaming, but are its affections well placed?
items.title_zh: 华尔街仍然热爱流媒体，但它的喜爱程度是否合理？
items.desc_en: While streaming continues to drive media stocks, especially around quarterly earnings, it's not clear when it will start driving profits for smaller players.
items.desc_zh: 虽然流媒体继续推动媒体股，特别是在季度收益方面，但目前尚不清楚它何时会开始为小型企业带来利润。

items.title_en: send/links
items.title_zh: send/links
items.desc_en: Save, organize, and find your links in one place
items.desc_zh: 在一处保存、整理和查找您的链接

items.title_en: Ex-Nigerian oil minister denies taking bribes
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚前石油部长否认受贿
items.desc_en: Diezani Alison-Madueke is accused of living “a life of luxury” in the UK at properties paid for and refurbished by industry figures.
items.desc_zh: 迪扎尼·艾莉森·马杜克 (Diezani Alison-Madueke) 被指控在英国过着“奢侈的生活”，其房产由行业人士支付和翻新。

items.title_zh: Softr AI Co-Builder

items.desc_zh: 使用人工智能构建真正有效的商业应用程序

items.title_en: Peru election drags into second day after ballot delivery fiasco
items.title_zh: 秘鲁选举在选票交付惨败后陷入第二天
items.desc_en: Technical and logistical problems mean Peruvians choosing a new president and members of Congress continue to vote on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 技术和后勤问题意味着秘鲁人选择新总统和国会议员周一将继续投票。

items.title_en: Iran carried out highest number of executions in decades
items.title_zh: 伊朗处决人数为数十年来最高
items.desc_en: Organisations warn many more people could be executed in the wake of the anti-government protests which swept Iran earlier this year.
items.desc_zh: 许多组织警告称，今年早些时候席卷伊朗的反政府抗议活动之后，可能会有更多人被处决。

items.title_en: Roblox defends expanded age‑checks after parents raise concerns over errors
items.title_zh: 在家长对错误表示担忧后，Roblox 为扩大年龄检查辩护
items.desc_en: With 144m daily users, the gaming company is extending its tech to introduce two age‑specific accounts.
items.desc_zh: 该游戏公司拥有 1.44 亿每日用户，正在扩展其技术，推出两个特定年龄的帐户。

items.title_en: GTA-maker Rockstar Games hacked again but downplays impact
items.title_zh: GTA 制作商 Rockstar Games 再次遭到黑客攻击，但淡化影响
items.desc_en: The incident marks the second time the games giant has been hacked by young, English-speaking hackers.
items.desc_zh: 此次事件标志着这家游戏巨头第二次遭到年轻的英语黑客的攻击。

items.desc_zh: 智能电池供电视频门铃可检测重要事件

items.title_en: Trump attacks Pope over criticism of Iran war
items.title_zh: 特朗普因批评伊朗战争而攻击教皇
items.desc_en: The US president accuses Leo of being "weak on crime and terrible for foreign policy".
items.desc_zh: 美国总统指责利奥“在犯罪方面软弱，在外交政策方面糟糕”。

items.title_en: Pope prioritises world's fastest-growing Catholic region in major Africa tour
items.title_zh: 教宗在主要非洲之行中优先考虑世界上发展最快的天主教地区
items.desc_en: Leo XIV wants the world's attention on a continent vital to the Church's future, an aide says.
items.desc_zh: 一位助手表示，利奥十四世希望世界关注这片对教会未来至关重要的大陆。

items.title_en: OpenAI boss Sam Altman's home targeted with Molotov cocktail
items.title_zh: OpenAI 老板萨姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的家遭到燃烧弹攻击
items.desc_en: San Francisco police have arrested a 20-year-old suspect after a perimeter gate was set alight.
items.desc_zh: 旧金山警方在外围大门被纵火后逮捕了一名 20 岁的嫌疑人。

items.title_en: Meta pulls Facebook ads recruiting for social media addiction lawsuits
items.title_zh: Meta 因社交媒体成瘾诉讼而撤回 Facebook 广告招募
items.desc_en: The Facebook owner recently lost a landmark social media addiction trial in California
items.desc_zh: Facebook 所有者最近在加州一场具有里程碑意义的社交媒体成瘾审判中败诉

items.title_en: Mayor warns of London 'disinformation blizzard'
items.title_zh: 伦敦市长警告“虚假信息暴风雪”
items.desc_en: Sir Sadiq Khan claims London is being targeted with disinformation portraying it as a city "in decline".
items.desc_zh: 萨迪克汗爵士声称伦敦成为虚假信息的目标，将其描绘成一座“衰落”的城市。

items.title_en: Dancer with MND performs on stage again through digital avatar
items.title_zh: 患有 MND 的舞者通过数字化身再次登台表演
items.desc_en: Breanna Olson said brainwave tech was able to re-establish the expression and connection she felt had gone.
items.desc_zh: 布里安娜·奥尔森 (Breanna Olson) 表示，脑电波技术能够重新建立她认为已经消失的表情和联系。

items.title_zh: MeerCOP
items.desc_en: The Ultimate Laptop Anti-Theft & Remote Monitoring App
items.desc_zh: 终极笔记本电脑防盗和远程监控应用程序

items.title_en: White House staff told not to place bets on prediction markets
items.title_zh: 白宫工作人员被告知不要在预测市场上下注
items.desc_en: The gambling platforms have grown in popularity, with some users making wagers on conflicts.
items.desc_zh: 赌博平台越来越受欢迎，一些用户对冲突下注。

items.title_en: OpenAI pauses UK data centre deal over energy costs and regulation
items.title_zh: OpenAI 因能源成本和监管问题暂停英国数据中心交易
items.desc_en: The project was part of a package of tech investment promising the UK could become an AI superpower.
items.desc_zh: 该项目是承诺英国可能成为人工智能超级大国的一​​揽子技术投资的一部分。

items.title_en: Amazon to end support for older Kindles, prompting user outcry
items.title_zh: 亚马逊将终止对旧版 Kindle 的支持，引发用户强烈抗议
items.desc_en: The move means owners of Kindles released before 2013 will be unable to download new e-books.
items.desc_zh: 此举意味着 2013 年之前发布的 Kindle 用户将无法下载新的电子书。

items.desc_zh: 这位英国计算机科学家兼企业家否认自己就是《纽约时报》认定的中本聪。
